overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing continuous movement through a damaged urban environment resembling a Mediterranean city. The player navigates a winding street lined with tall residential buildings, stone retaining walls, and military-style barricades with green netting. The scene features abandoned vehicles and debris scattered across the asphalt under bright midday sun.

multi-story beige apartment building with balconies
military-style green tarp barriers blocking the roadside
distant mountain range visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit curved road bordered by a massive stone retaining wall on the left and tall residential buildings on the right. The camera moves forward at a running pace, approaching a barricaded section marked by green military netting. The environment suggests a Mediterranean coastal city with clear skies and no visible pedestrian or vehicle activity.

exiting the camouflaged barricade area into open street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow, barricaded section of street enclosed by green military netting and black tarp walls. An abandoned white truck blocks part of the path, requiring navigation around concrete barriers. The lighting becomes slightly diffused as the camera passes under the overhead coverings before emerging back into open sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between tall apartment buildings

events.description: slight left turn to avoid debris in road
navigating around abandoned car in the middle of the street

tall black fabric construction barrier running along the sidewalk
broken concrete blocks and construction debris piled along the road

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a narrow urban canyon flanked by tall apartment buildings on both sides. The street is littered with abandoned vehicles and construction debris. The player character runs steadily forward, weaving around a silver sedan parked in the lane, with distant mountains visible at the end of the street canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban street with mixed architecture

events.description: building facades change from modern concrete to older stone architecture
passing close to blue tarp covered structure on left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various abandoned vehicles, approaching a more densely built section with older architecture

notable_agents.action: abandoned truck blocking the road ahead

entered.detail: older beige stone building with traditional architectural details

modern high-rise building with glass and concrete facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the urban canyon as the architecture transitions from modern apartment blocks to older stone buildings. The camera passes blue construction tarps and abandoned trucks while maintaining a steady running pace. The street remains deserted with debris scattered across the asphalt, leading toward a distant intersection with taller modern buildings visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sunlit Mediterranean street that transitions from an open coastal road into a narrow, debris-strewn urban canyon. It begins along a curved road bordered by a massive stone retaining wall and tall residential buildings, moving at a running pace toward a barricaded zone. As the camera passes through this checkpoint, the lighting becomes diffused under green military netting and black tarp walls before emerging back into the bright midday sun. The scene then opens into a tight corridor of apartment blocks where the camera weaves around abandoned vehicles and construction debris, with distant mountains framing the end of the street. Finally, the architecture shifts from modern blocks to older stone buildings as the camera passes blue tarps and deserted trucks, heading toward a distant intersection of taller modern structures.
